query: SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, status FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Samantha' AND lastName = 'Buker'; SELECT id, firstName, lastName FROM patients WHERE NOT (firstName = 'Samantha' AND lastName = 'Buker') ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
